name: factscope-ai
description: AI-powered news credibility and fact verification desktop application powered by Google Gemini.
author: Factscope AI

scripts.electron:dev: concurrently "npm run dev:frontend" "npm run dev:server" "wait-on http://localhost:3000 http://localhost:3001 --exec cross-env NODE_ENV=development electron ."
scripts.electron:preview: npm run build && npm run electron:compile && cross-env NODE_ENV=production electron .
scripts.electron:build: npm run build && npm run electron:compile && electron-builder && powershell -Command "New-Item -ItemType Directory -Force -Path release; Copy-Item -Path 'C:\Users\Hamza Ali\factscope-build-output\Factscope-AI-*' -Destination 'release\' -Force"
